title: Message ActionHook Payload
description: Payload sent to the message verb's actionHook with the delivery status of an outbound SMS.

carrier.description: Name of the carrier used to send the message. Present on success or carrier-level failure.

carrier_message_id.description: Message ID returned by the carrier. Present on success or carrier-level failure.

message_failure_reason.description: Reason for failure. Present when message_status is 'failure' or 'system error'.
